report.summary: Cycle-close v8: No new commits since e3f63fc. All 6 API routes have caching + CDN headers. 4 queued pages pending in PUBLISH_QUEUE (uncommitted). 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking — ignoreBuildErrors: true). 59 uncommitted files in working tree.

sections.title: QA: Page & Build Verification
items: Latest commit: e3f63fc — 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker, published pages update (no new commits this cycle)
No 'use client' + metadata export conflicts detected in recently changed files
New pages have proper metadata: crypto-staking-guide-2026, euler-v2-modular-lending-guide-2026, flash-loans-defi-guide-2026 all export Metadata with title, description, OG tags
56 published slugs lack static page.tsx (taxes/*, wallets/*, investing/best/*) — no dynamic [slug] route covers them. These will 404 if visited.

141 TypeScript errors across 4 files: structured-data.examples.ts (syntax), crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026, lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026. Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors: true.

sections.title: Data Engineer: API Routes Health
items: /api/prices — HEALTHY: CoinGecko markets, CACHE_TTL 60s, s-maxage=60, stale-while-revalidate=120, has fallback data
/api/trending — HEALTHY: CoinGecko trending, CACHE_TTL 300s, s-maxage=300, stale-while-revalidate=600, no explicit fallback
/api/fear-greed — HEALTHY: alternative.me FNG, CACHE_TTL 600s, s-maxage=600, stale-while-revalidate=1200, no explicit fallback
/api/market-metrics — HEALTHY: CoinGecko global + alternative.me FNG, CACHE_TTL 60s, no explicit fallback object
/api/market-dominance — HEALTHY: CoinGecko global, CACHE_TTL 300s, s-maxage=300, has 4 fallback references
/api/defi-yields — HEALTHY: DefiLlama pools, dynamic cache duration, no explicit fallback
Rate limiting: None of the 6 public API routes use checkRateLimit — all are unprotected against abuse

sections.title: DevOps: Deployment & Infrastructure
items: Build config: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true — optimized for Vercel 8GB
Middleware: PILLAR_PAGES set inlined correctly, security headers present (X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, X-DNS-Prefetch-Control)
Static assets: Cache-Control immutable with 1-year TTL on _next/static
59 uncommitted files in working tree (reports, OG images, modified components) — these won't deploy until committed and pushed
Egress proxy blocks degen0x.com from this environment — unable to verify live HTTP status directly this cycle

sections.title: Project Manager: Cycle Summary
items: Last shipped: e3f63fc — 4 learn guides + stablecoin yield tracker + 8 OG images + published pages update (95 files, +10,972 lines)
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 4 new pages queued but uncommitted (drift-protocol hack analysis, polkadot staking halving, impermanent loss guide, hyperliquid perp dex)
634 pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 4 in queue pending commit
Carry-over blockers: 56 published slugs with no route (taxes, wallets, investing verticals), 4 files with TS errors, 0/6 API routes have rate limiting
No blockers requiring immediate Jefe attention — all issues are pre-existing carry-overs
